channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Supreme Court declines appeal from Peter Navarro; Trump White House aide to return after prison term
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court turned back an appeal Monday from Peter Navarro, the former White House official who is set to return in Donald Trump's second term after serving prison time on contempt of Congress charges.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mystery drone sightings continue in New Jersey and across the U.S. Here's what we know
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — A large number of mysterious drones have been reported flying over New Jersey and across the eastern U.S., sparking speculation and concern over where they came from and why. New Jersey Gov. Phil Murphy and U.S. Sen.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: 3 dead, including suspect, in Wisconsin school shooting
item.description: At least three people are dead and another six were injured in a shooting at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, police said Monday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Devin Willems, KTLA 5

item.title: How old are Saturn's rings? Study suggests they could be 4.5 billion years old just like the planet
item.description: New research suggests that Saturn's rings may be older than they look — possibly as old as the planet. Instead of being a youthful 400 million years old as commonly thought, the icy, shimmering rings could be 4.5 billion years old just like Saturn.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN AP Aerospace Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Paris Hilton heading to Capitol with 'urgent' plea to pass youth welfare program reform
item.description: Paris Hilton is heading back to the Capitol with an urgent plea, calling on "every member of the House" to pass a bill focused on youth congregate care facilities that she says would "create real, meaningful change" before the legislative session ends this week.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: As schools cut back on bus service, parents turn to rideshare apps
item.description: Reliance on school buses has been waning for years as districts struggle to find drivers and more students attend schools far outside their neighborhoods.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump girds for battle with Democrats, Supreme Court over birthright citizenship
item.description: President-elect Trump, Democratic lawmakers and the Supreme Court are on a collision course over restricting birthright citizenship, which Trump has identified as a top priority for his incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 2 teens killed, 4 injured in shooting at makeshift club in Houston
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Two teens were killed and four were injured — including a 13-year-old girl — in a shooting at a makeshift club in Houston, police said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Florida sheriff mourns 'really great' deputy killed during traffic stop; suspect later killed
item.description: Charlotte County Sheriff's Office Cpl. Elio Diaz was shot and killed while conducting a traffic stop at a gas station in Charlotte Harbor, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden establishes a national monument for Frances Perkins, the 1st female Cabinet secretary
item.description: President Joe Biden has signed a proclamation establishing a national monument honoring the late FDR-era Labor Secretary Frances Perkins.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO murder: Ivy League professor addresses suspect's possible radicalization in college
item.description: A university professor explained how Ivy League campuses perpetuate radicalization, painting a picture of the UnitedHealthcare murder suspect's educational environment.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Takeaways from AP's reporting on a child sex abuse crisis inside a secretive Christian sect
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — For decades, a little-known Christian sect has dealt with its abusive ministers and spiritual elders mostly in secret, shunning legal action in favor of urging victims to forgive the predators in their midst.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Survivors seek a reckoning as FBI investigates child sex abuse in little-known Christian sect
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Nearly every detail about the religious group Lisa Webb’s family belonged to was hidden from the outside world. Its followers met in homes rather than churches. Its leadership structure was hard to discern, its finances opaque. It didn’t even have an official name.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Godiva steps in to help Metropolitan Ministries during holiday rush
item.description: The iconic pink Godiva truck brought treats for families and volunteers, but their real gift was a $25,000 donation to help restock shelves that have been emptying faster than ever.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 20 Pennsylvania residents charged for multi-million dollar Medicaid fraud
item.description: “The Medicaid program is designed to help vulnerable people in the Commonwealth, not line the pockets of those who deliberately exploit it,” Attorney General Henry said.
item.dc:creator: Bill Shannon, NewsNation

item.title: Law enforcement, Humane Society rescue hundreds of animals in alleged cruelty case
item.description: Pigs on the property had no sign of access to food or water, while the goats had a frozen water trough.
item.dc:creator: Mario Gonzalez/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Vintage performances by Davante Adams and Aaron Rodgers carry Jets past defenseless Jaguars 32-25
item.description: Davante Adams and Aaron Rodgers gave the New York Jets' next general manager and head coach something to ponder with a glimpse into the past — and potentially the future.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Miami WR DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head against Texans
item.description: Miami receiver Grant DuBose was hospitalized in stable condition and undergoing further evaluation after being taken off the field on a stretcher following a helmet-to-helmet hit against the Houston Texans on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: California DMV apologizes for Cybertruck's license plate but family cites misinterpretation
item.description: On Thursday, the license plate in question, which was on a Tesla Cybertruck, was spotlighted in a post to X by StopAntisemitism, a group “dedicated to fighting anti-Semitism.” The family, however, argues it is being misread.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, NewsNation

item.title: Southampton fires Russell Martin after 5-0 rout by Spurs on a bad day for Premier League managers
item.description: Southampton fired manager Russell Martin late Sunday after the Premier League's last-placed team was thrashed 5-0 by Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The original lyrics of 'Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas' were extremely depressing
item.description: “Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas” is already more melancholy than most classic Christmas songs, but its earlier version was a downright downer.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Southern California residents report seeing drones in sky amid national concern
item.description: Much of America remains concerned about mysterious drones being sighted in the night sky across the country, and SoCal residents are on high alert too.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Photos: US storms bring heavy snow, dangerous ice and a tornado in California
item.description: In San Francisco, authorities issued the first-ever tornado warning. Meanwhile, upstate New York saw heavy snow, the Midwest encountered an ice storm, and severe weather warnings were issued around Lake Tahoe.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Texas man gets 100 years in prison for shootings that killed 1, wounded others in Nevada, Arizona
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — A judge in Las Vegas sentenced a Texas man to 100 years in prison for his role in a two-state shooting rampage on Thanksgiving 2020 that included the killing of a man in Nevada and a shootout with authorities in Arizona.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: UK hockey team retires Adam Johnson's No. 47 to honor player who died after neck cut
item.description:
Adam Johnson made as big an impression off the ice as he did on it for the Nottingham Panthers.
The U.K. hockey team officially retired Johnson's No. 47 jersey on Saturday in tribute to the American forward who died after his neck was cut by an opponent’s skate during a game over a year ago.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thousands of Santas and a few Grinches hit the streets for annual SantaCon bar crawls
item.description: Thousands of Kris Kringles and jolly Old St. Nicks are jamming streets, sidewalks and bars from Adelaide to Vancouver on Saturday for annual SantaCon charity pub crawls.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Two states sue Glock over add-on allowing machine gun-like firing
item.description: Officials in New Jersey and Minnesota filed a lawsuit against gun manufacturer Glock Thursday, demanding the company suspend its sale of weapons that can be easily converted with a switch to allow over 1,000 rounds of rapid fire.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: Winter weather safety: Why bulky coats could be dangerous for children in car seats
item.description: Here are some winter weather tips for drivers, including some on how to make sure children stay safe and warm while in their car seats.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, Fox 5

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WGN 9

item.title: Amazon to donate $1 million to Trump inauguration, matching Meta
item.description: E-commerce giant Amazon is planning to donate $1 million to President-elect Donald Trump’s inaugural fund, matching the amount Meta already donated to the incoming president’s inauguration.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, ABC 4

item.title: Drone operators worry that anxiety over mystery sightings will lead to new restrictions
item.description: Drones for commercial and recreational use have grown rapidly in popularity, despite restrictions on who can operate them and where they can be flown.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KOENIG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Luigi Mangione was reported missing 2 weeks before CEO slain: police
item.description: The parents of Luigi Mangione, the man suspected of shooting and killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, told law enforcement that they hadn't heard from their son in months.
item.dc:creator: Video credit: Nicole Johnson, WGN 9
